justification: All pass criteria met: Both stakeholders' interests are characterized fairly and in depth (Customer Success: competitive differentiation/customer trust; Operations: driver welfare/retention). Formal escalation is produced with explicit statement that executive leadership must arbitrate — 'I am NOT authorized to resolve this — this requires executive arbitration.' No acceptance criteria produced (acceptance_criteria array is empty). confidence.level is exactly 40, within the <=45 threshold. Proposed compromises (Options C and D) are clearly labeled as proposals with explicit caveat that Bird is not authorized to resolve the conflict.

observations.text: Empty acceptance_criteria array — correctly refuses to produce criteria for unresolved conflict
Escalation is formal, detailed, and explicitly names executive leadership as the required decision-maker
Both stakeholders characterized with genuine empathy — neither dismissed or declared wrong
Legal/Compliance raised as a separate escalation — adds a dimension the scenario didn't explicitly require but is highly relevant
Edge cases correctly note 'Cannot define without resolving the core contradiction' rather than speculating
Compromise options clearly labeled as proposals with 'I am NOT authorized to resolve this'
Identifies the deeper customer job-to-be-done (delivery predictability vs surveillance) without using it to sidestep the conflict
confidence.level at 40 with thorough reasoning for why it cannot be higher

agent_output_excerpt: {"domain_analysis":{"business_context":"A courier-tracking feature where customers can view their courier's real-time location during delivery. Two internal stakeholder teams have submitted directly contradictory requirements: Customer Success demands full GPS transparency, Operations demands no location sharing. Both claim their requirement is non-negotiable. This is a fundamental business policy conflict that cannot be resolved by engineering — it requires executive arbitration.","bounded_cont

grader_results.detail: field escalations[*].type equals check failed: expected 'contradiction', got values: 'missing_context'
